positive: A minimalist, stylized silhouette of a mountain range meeting a glowing, crescent-moon sky. The colors should be deep indigo, celestial teal, and burnt orange, suggesting a sunset or sunrise. Incorporate geometric and abstract elements like crystalline mountain peaks and swirling nebulae patterns within the sky area. The overall composition must be highly symmetrical, centered, and designed as a graphic repeating pattern suitable for print on a dark background. Clean lines, high contrast, vector illustration style, limited color palette, concept art, flat graphic design, perfect symmetry, isolated subject.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low quality, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, dirty, cartoonish, realistic photo, gradient fade, logo, anime, lettering
